rationale: Review 2's actionable split recommendation -- keep AffineAlgGroup/AlgPoints as a Layer-0 PR, defer IsUnipotent/ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup -- leads to a focused, on-roadmap PR; Review 1's additional bundling critique of AffineAlgGroup is unverifiable from the diff and risks needless restructuring of otherwise legitimate Layer-0 material.
